summary: EspoCRM-like Features Testing Complete - All backend APIs (21/21 tests passed) and frontend UI features verified. Accounts CRUD, Contacts CRUD, Lead Detail with Stream, and updated sidebar navigation all working correctly.

issues: Console warning: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent - accessibility improvement needed

critical_code_review_comments: All Accounts CRUD operations working: create, list (with contacts_count/leads_count), get detail, update, delete
All Contacts CRUD operations working: create with account_id, list (with account_name), get detail, update, delete
Lead Detail page shows all EspoCRM-style fields: Stage, Amount, Account, Probability, Close Date, Lead Source, Contacts, Phone, Description
Stream functionality working: comment input, Post button, existing comments show with user name and timestamp
Status change auto-creates stream entry (status_change type)
Lead Detail right sidebar has Stage quick-change buttons, Assigned User, Priority, Created date, Notes, Quick Actions
Edit dialog has all required fields: status, priority, amount, probability, close_date, account, lead_source, description, notes
Sidebar navigation includes: Dashboard, Accounts, Contacts, Leads, Pipeline, Lead Scraper, Visitor Analytics
Dashboard quick action cards include: Accounts, Contacts, Lead Scraper, Pipeline, Visitors
Clicking lead row in Leads table navigates to /workspace/sales/leads/{id}
Clicking lead card in Pipeline navigates to /workspace/sales/leads/{id}
Existing data verified: 'Hinal Container Lines' account with 1 contact, 'Rahul Sharma' contact linked to account
seed_data_creation: Test accounts and contacts created/deleted during pytest. Stream comments added to first lead.
context_for_next_testing_agent: EspoCRM-like features fully implemented and tested. Accounts at /workspace/sales/accounts, Contacts at /workspace/sales/contacts, Lead Detail at /workspace/sales/leads/{id}. Stream uses Enter key to submit (without Shift). DuckDuckGo scraper does NOT work in preview (egress blocked).

test_classes: TestAccountsCRUD - 6 tests (create, list with counts, search, get detail, update, delete)
TestContactsCRUD - 6 tests (create with account, list with account_name, search, get detail, update, delete)
TestLeadDetailAndStream - 5 tests (get detail, add comment, get stream, update with new fields, status change creates stream entry)
TestExistingData - 3 tests (verify Hinal account, Rahul contact, leads exist)
